mapper.select: SELECT a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, a.auction_target_price AS auctionTargetPrice, a.auction_end_at AS auctionEndAt, a.auction_regdate AS auctionRegdate, a.auction_status_idx AS auctionStatusIdx, ast.auction_status_name AS auctionStatusName, ic.item_category_name AS itemCategoryName, ic.item_category_code AS itemCategoryCode, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid bcnt WHERE bcnt.auction_idx = a.auction_idx AND bcnt.bid_status_idx IN (1, 2, 3) ) AS bidCount, ( SELECT MIN(bmin.bid_price) FROM bid bmin WHERE bmin.auction_idx = a.auction_idx AND bmin.bid_status_idx IN (1, 2, 3) ) AS minBidPrice, wb.bid_idx AS winnerBidIdx, i.item_name AS winnerItemName, wb.bid_price AS winnerBidPrice, wm.mem_id AS winnerBidderMemId, CASE WHEN wm.mem_id IS NULL OR wm.mem_id = '' THEN '-' WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(wm.mem_id) > 2 THEN CONCAT( SUBSTRING(wm.mem_id, 1, 2), REPEAT('*', GREATEST(1, CHAR_LENGTH(wm.mem_id) - 3)), SUBSTRING(wm.mem_id, CHAR_LENGTH(wm.mem_id), 1) ) ELSE CONCAT(SUBSTRING(wm.mem_id, 1, 1), REPEAT('*', GREATEST(1, CHAR_LENGTH(wm.mem_id) - 1))) END AS winnerBidderMemIdMasked FROM auction a JOIN auction_status ast ON a.auction_status_idx = ast.auction_status_idx JOIN item_category ic ON a.item_category_idx = ic.item_category_idx LEFT JOIN bid wb ON wb.auction_idx = a.auction_idx AND wb.bid_status_idx = 2 LEFT JOIN item i ON wb.item_idx = i.item_idx LEFT JOIN member wm ON wb.bidder_idx = wm.mem_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} AND a.auction_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY a.auction_regdate DESC
SELECT bv.*, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle FROM bid_list_view bv JOIN auction a ON bv.auction_idx = a.auction_idx WHERE bv.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY bv.bid_regdate DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.board_title, b.board_view_count, b.board_like, b.board_regdate, bt.board_type_name, bt.board_type_code, mp.mem_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.board_idx = b.board_idx AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N') AS reply_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON b.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx WHERE b.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.board_regdate DESC

SELECT p.*, i.item_name, i.item_brand, i.item_thumbnail_img, a.auction_title, a.auction_status_idx FROM payment p JOIN bid b ON p.bid_idx = b.bid_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx WHERE b.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} AND p.pay_status = 'DONE' ORDER BY p.pay_regdate DESC
SELECT bid_idx FROM bid WHERE auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND bid_status_idx = 2 LIMIT 1

SELECT p.*, i.item_name, i.item_thumbnail_img, d.courier_company, d.tracking_number, d.delivery_status, d.shipped_at, d.delivered_at FROM payment p JOIN bid b ON p.bid_idx = b.bid_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx LEFT JOIN delivery d ON p.bid_idx = d.bid_idx WHERE p.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND p.pay_status IN ('DONE', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY p.pay_regdate DESC

SELECT p.*, i.item_name, i.item_thumbnail_img, d.courier_company, d.tracking_number, d.delivery_status, d.shipped_at, d.delivered_at FROM payment p JOIN bid b ON p.bid_idx = b.bid_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx LEFT JOIN delivery d ON p.bid_idx = d.bid_idx WHERE b.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} AND p.pay_status IN ('DONE', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY p.pay_regdate DESC
